| rs1 | [31:24] | 0x0 |

| Description | Inst Word | Ctrl Word |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|
| FADD R7, R0, R7 | `0x0000000700077221` | `0x004fca0000000000` |
| FADD R6, R6, R9 | `0x0000000906067221` | `0x008fc80000000000` |
| FADD R0, R7, R6 | `0x0000000607007221` | `0x000fe20000000000` |
| FADD R11, R8, R11 | `0x0000000b080b7221` | `0x010fc60000000000` |
| FADD R9, R11, R0 | `0x000000000b097221` | `0x000fc60000000000` |

*Notes:* Rd in inst[23:16], Rs1 in inst[31:24], Rs2 in inst[39:32]. 8-bit fields, R255 (0xFF) = RZ. Physical register numbers assigned by ptxas register allocator.
